# Costa Blanca Movement Centre

> Expert spine and mobility care for the expat community on Spain's Costa Blanca.

## About

Costa Blanca Movement Centre is a specialist mobility and spine health clinic located in Torrevieja, on the southern Costa Blanca, Spain. We provide non-surgical treatments for back pain, neck pain, sports injuries, and postural problems. Our clinic primarily serves the international expat community — British, Dutch, Scandinavian, and German residents living on the Costa Blanca.

## Treatments

- Spinal Decompression (/treatments/spinal-decompression): Non-surgical motorised traction therapy to relieve compressed spinal discs and nerves. Effective for herniated discs, sciatica, and chronic lower back pain. Duration: 30–45 minutes.
- Sports Massage (/treatments/sports-massage): Deep tissue and sports-focused massage for injury recovery, muscle tension, and improved mobility. Duration: 45–60 minutes.
- Postural Assessment (/treatments/postural-assessment): Comprehensive evaluation of alignment and movement patterns to identify the root cause of pain.
- Dry Needling (/treatments/dry-needling): Targeted trigger point therapy using thin needles for chronic pain relief and muscle tension release.

## Conditions We Treat

- Lower Back Pain (/conditions/lower-back-pain)
- Neck Pain (/conditions/neck-pain)
- Sciatica (/conditions/sciatica)
- Herniated Disc (/conditions/herniated-disc)

## Location & Contact

- Clinic: Costa Blanca Movement Centre
- Address: Calle Example 123, 03181 Torrevieja, Alicante, Spain
- Phone: +34 XXX XXX XXX
- Email: info@costablancamovement.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9:00–18:00, Saturday 9:00–13:00, Sunday closed

## Service Areas

- Torrevieja (main clinic)
- Orihuela Costa (15 min drive)
- Guardamar del Segura (15 min drive)
- Pilar de la Horadada (20 min drive)

## Languages

English, Dutch, Spanish

## Team

- Dr. James Mitchell — Chiropractor & Movement Specialist. Doctor of Chiropractic (DC), Certified Spinal Decompression Specialist, Sports Rehabilitation Diploma. 15+ years experience.
- Laura van den Berg — Sports Massage Therapist. BSc Sports Therapy, Certified Myofascial Release Practitioner, Dry Needling Certificate. 8 years experience.
